situation: audit-2026-07-08-042 derived_fix PA-AUD-M-002 pending. xiaozhi_server.py:141 uses module-level SAMPLE_RATE (16000) constant for utterance discard threshold instead of session-negotiated self.sample_rate. When device negotiates non-16k rate (e.g. 8000 or 48000), the 0.5s byte threshold is wrong — legitimate short utterances dropped at low rates, noise kept at high rates.
action: Replace SAMPLE_RATE with self.sample_rate in line 141 threshold expression. Single-line route-fix.
